assertions.assertion: Output adds the 'Duende.IdentityServer' meter (or Telemetry.ServiceName) to the metrics configuration
assertions.rationale: Does not add the Duende.IdentityServer meter; only adds generic AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation and AddRuntimeInstrumentation

assertions.assertion: Output configures a Prometheus exporter for metrics (AddPrometheusExporter) and maps the scraping endpoint (UseOpenTelemetryPrometheusScrapingEndpoint)
Output adds only IdentityServerConstants.Tracing.Basic as the tracing source for production, and does NOT include Stores, Validation, Cache, or Services sources
assertions.rationale: Does not add any IdentityServer-specific tracing sources; only uses generic AddAspNetCoreInstrumentation and AddHttpClientInstrumentation

assertions.assertion: Output includes the necessary OpenTelemetry NuGet packages (OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting, OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore, OpenTelemetry.Exporter.OpenTelemetryProtocol or Prometheus exporter)
assertions.rationale: Lists OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting, OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.AspNetCore, Prometheus.AspNetCore, and OTLP exporter
